Class GraphicsState

java.lang.Object
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.graphics.impl.GraphicsState
public class GraphicsState extends Object
Represents the current graphics state of a RenderCanvas.
See Also:
  • RenderCanvas
  • RenderCanvas.save()
  • RenderCanvas.restore()

    Description

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    GraphicsState
    copy()
    Creates a deep copy of this graphics state.
    boolean
    hasClip()
    Returns whether clip must be applied.
    boolean
    hasTransform()
    Checks whether this state has any non-identity transformations.
    void
    mulTransform(AffineTransform at)
    Multiplies the transformation by the given matrix.
    void
    resetClip()
    Resets the clipping region to none.
    void
    rotate(double deg)
    Rotates the transform by the given amount of degrees
    void
    scale(double sx, double sy)
    Scales the transform by the given deltas.
    void
    setClipH(double clipH)
    Sets the height of clipping region.
    void
    setClipW(double clipW)
    Sets the width of clipping region.
    void
    setClipX(double clipX)
    Sets the X coordinate of the top-left corner of clipping region.
    void
    setClipY(double clipY)
    Sets the Y coordinate of the top-left corner of clipping region.
    void
    setLineWidth(double lineWidth)
    Sets the new line width.
    void
    translate(double tx, double ty)
    Translates the transform by the given deltas.

  • Constructor Details

    • GraphicsState

      public GraphicsState()

  • Method Details

    • copy

      public GraphicsState copy()
      Creates a deep copy of this graphics state.
      Returns:
      a new GraphicsState with identical property values

    • translate

      public void translate(double tx, double ty)
      Translates the transform by the given deltas.
      Parameters:
      tx - the X delta
      ty - the Y delta
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is infinite or NaN

    • rotate

      public void rotate(double deg)
      Rotates the transform by the given amount of degrees
      Parameters:
      deg - the rotation delta
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if deg is infinite, or NaN

    • scale

      public void scale(double sx, double sy)
      Scales the transform by the given deltas.
      Parameters:
      sx - the X axis scale delta
      sy - the Y axis scale delta
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is non-positive, infinite or NaN

    • mulTransform

      public void mulTransform(AffineTransform at)
      Multiplies the transformation by the given matrix.
      Parameters:
      at - the transform matrix
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if transform matrix is null

    • setLineWidth

      public void setLineWidth(double lineWidth)
      Sets the new line width.
      Parameters:
      lineWidth - the new line width
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if lineWidth is non-positive, infinite, or NaN

    • setClipX

      public void setClipX(double clipX)
      Sets the X coordinate of the top-left corner of clipping region.
      Parameters:
      clipX - the new value
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if negative, infinite, or NaN

    • setClipY

      public void setClipY(double clipY)
      Sets the Y coordinate of the top-left corner of clipping region.
      Parameters:
      clipY - the new value
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if negative, infinite, or NaN

    • setClipW

      public void setClipW(double clipW)
      Sets the width of clipping region.
      Parameters:
      clipW - the new value
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if non-positive, infinite, or NaN

    • setClipH

      public void setClipH(double clipH)
      Sets the height of clipping region.
      Parameters:
      clipH - the new value
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if non-positive, infinite, or NaN

    • resetClip

      public void resetClip()
      Resets the clipping region to none.

    • hasClip

      public boolean hasClip()
      Returns whether clip must be applied.
      Returns:
      whether clip must be applied

    • hasTransform

      public boolean hasTransform()
      Checks whether this state has any non-identity transformations.
      Returns:
      true if translation, rotation, or scaling is applied
